highlights.text: I specified this back last Friday at 4pm, when we were 6020, by stating: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend, until it ends.
My lean is we work back up to 6050, then 6081.
I wrote on Wednesday, “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
That footprint is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
I wrote last Friday at 4pm: “…Wait for a Failed Breakdown of Thursdays 5970 low.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a powerful Failed Breakdown we had Monday at 12:40PM as this was the terminal Failed Breakdown inside the triangle and the final “fuse” for the breakout leg.
5978-82 to 6081= a range (descending triangle) with 6050 a key magnet inside.

post_title: After 5 Days of Straight Upside and+280 Points This Week, Can July 4th Week Keep It Going? June 30 Plan
